proposition: All Demerzel personas have corresponding behavioral tests as required by persona-requirements rule

supporting.claim: All 14 original personas have dedicated behavioral test files in tests/behavioral/

contradicting.claim: Framework has expanded beyond 14 personas — 13 Streeling departments with persona heads, 7 ga agent personas, experimentation persona (v1.1.0 added post-belief). Test coverage for expanded persona set is unverified. Commit c6e0a25 (2026-03-21) added a missing behavioral test, confirming gaps existed after this belief was recorded.
